title: DSE-1245 play Son's New Wife Omnibus - Yu Kawakami (Shizuku Morino)
overview: Indecent forbidden temptation emitted by a dazzling body. A new wife's lust that can't be hidden. New wives who are pushed up by their father-in-law's meat stick and scream. Forgive me... I will be held by my father-in-law today as well. The long-awaited omnibus of the popular series!
